title: Law No. 16 of 2014 Regarding the Protection of State Information and Documents
summary: Directly qualifies Bahrain’s open data regime by excluding protected state information and documents from disclosure or open publication and extending protection to participating public and certain private entities.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Protects state information and documents from unauthorised disclosure.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.cybercrime: Protects state information and documents from unauthorised disclosure.

notes: Related instruments: Amended by Legislative Decree No. 14 of 2023
